reviews.review_description:
Only two levels at present but still incredible quality and value for money. The puzzles are very eclectic but lack any 'theme' - which relates to my big request if this game is to be developed further.

 It needs a story! 

Why are we in this house? Whose house is it? Where is everyone else?

 I'd suggest something along the lines of an eccentric collector of curios from around the world who has gone missing and the player is some type of detective employed to search his house for clues, maybe?

 Also, all the actions need a sound. When I smash vases with a big wooden stick I need to hear it!

I want an inventory to carry things around in. Love the torch. If I could carry that with me it would be great to reveal later clues, like the stains on the piano perhaps? 

Save points need to be much more frequent. Very frustrating to have to restart in the living room if struggling with the piano or arrows!

Finally it needs some form of increasingly helpful clues, available over a period of time. Something like 
1. A knight's sword appears to be missing; 
2. Not all of the knights appear to be right-handed;. 
3. Perhaps each sword needs to be in the correct left/right slot for each knight.

Can't wait for more.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the wonderful review and detailed feedback!

We truly appreciate the time you took to share your thoughtful ideas with us. We will carefully review and consider your suggestions to make the game even better. Thank you for your support!

reviews.review_description: I've only done the first stage, but so far so good. It reminds me a bit of PC escape games with its ease of play. What I like about this is that it's very straight forward without any fuss. For example, there're no annoying objects that get knocked around that have nothing to do with the puzzles, things are easy to grab and slide, the puzzles so far aren't particularly difficult so far, but I'm sure they'll get more complex. Overall, it's quite a relaxing experience whilst stimulating the gray cells. And to top it off, the price is amazingly cheap for what you are getting. I almost passed it over thinking that something so cheap had to be crap, it's not, so give it a go!!

developer_response.body:
Hi Xippt, thank you so much for leaving the very first review!

​I truly appreciate you taking a chance on my game and purchasing it.

There are currently only 2 stages, but I'll be working hard to add more in the future. I hope you enjoy the rest of your escape! If you experience any issues or have any feedback, please feel free to contact me at seareal314@gmail.com.

reviews.review_description:
I mean you’re not allowed to complain if the game is $1.99. It outstanding for its price. 

If I were to complain I’d say add some hints, i still don’t get  the very last puzzle even though i know the correct numbers.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for leaving a valuable review!
We will internally consider your feedback regarding the lack of puzzle explanations.
We will keep working hard to provide you with a great experience in the future.

reviews.review_description:
I just finished the 2 stages. In the 2nd one, the puzzle with the arrows, it took a while before I saw it 🤣🤣.

I suggest to add seated mode. Normally I play seated. Not possible to play seated. You are too little to solve the puzzles, to see the important things.

Hope to see more stages in the future! This is already a good start.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback!

Regarding the seated play, we currently have a height adjustment feature mapped to the 'B' button. However, we're sorry to hear if it wasn't sufficient or comfortable for your experience. We will definitely look into refining and improving this system to ensure better accessibility in future updates.

reviews.review_description: It's a nice game. Attractive and seems to have decent puzzles. Haven't really had time to get into yet, but for the small price, it's very well worth it if you like puzzles.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the positive review!
We are thrilled that you found our game attractive.
Thank you for supporting our game!

reviews.review_description: First off,  I just gifted 3 friends this, that should b enpugh to show I like it already and promised more to come so get to work so get to work Dec!!🤣 Jokes but really don't leav me hanging!! This is a great start and can’t wait to c what’s added next so highly recommended and  dev saying in other review adding way mor!! Controls smooth and easy for all players also but lov lov lov what I see so far!!!TO DEV: need a tad of help I hav played the start room then the next but where u go into the biggest room, which is third including the start one I’m stuck but seeing if they’re is a way to open that one or does it just end like u r still creating the last door and wil b n the rest in update of that room ? Just really stuck and dnt obviously want to play for hrs thinking it will open or can find solution  that’s would b prettyrdumb, right?😆🥴  TY for creating this game  and congrats on the hard wk already shown  in it already so keep it up😁

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the wonderful review! 
Both of the currently available stages are fully completed up to the final room, so you can play all the way through to the ending.
If you ever find the puzzles too difficult or get stuck while playing, please feel free to join our official Discord (https://discord.gg/MfdhGrSuuX) and leave a question in the #hints-and-tips channel!

reviews.review_description: it's so much better than spending $20 in real life and only getting 1 hour

developer_response.body:
Thank you for supporting our game!
We are so glad to hear that you had a great experience.
We will keep working hard to provide you with an even better experience in the future.

reviews.review_description: Qualitatively made, the puzzles are intuitive, but they still make the brains work! and it's very nice that 2 rooms are just the beginning, according to the developer, new rooms will be constantly added

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing our game! 
We will keep working hard to provide great content in the future.

reviews.review_description: The puzzles in this game are so different and so fun. The graphics are beautiful. The mechanics work really well. No issues. Fantastic job dev. I look forward to more!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the wonderful review! 
We are so glad that you had fun playing our game.

reviews.review_title: escape room for a very attractive price
reviews.review_description: Great escape room for a very attractive price. Nicely made. Not too difficult, yet challenging enough. For this price, just buy it.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing

We're thrilled you enjoyed the game and really appreciate your recommendation!

reviews.review_description: As someone who always plays escape rooms, this one was so good!!! I wish it was longer!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your valuable review! We will keep working hard to bring you even more exciting content.
